>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/get_installed_certificate"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



This API is used to get installed certificates. 

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>

  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"command":{"type":"string","example":"get_installed_certificates","description":"Command issued to get install certificate"},"requestId":{"type":"string","example":"abc123","description":"A unique identifier for the request, allowing tracking and debugging of the operation."}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"default":{"description":"get_installed_certificate response","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"command":{"type":"string","example":"get_installed_certificates"},"requestId":{"type":"string","example":"abc123"},"apiVersion":{"type":"string","enum":["V1.0","V1.1"]},"installedCerts":{"title":"installedCerts","x-stoplight":{"id":"svr3iljexdwdi"},"type":"object","properties":{"certInfo":{"type":"array","description":"A list of installed certificates with their details.","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"name":{"type":"string","description":"The name of the certificate.","example":"Reader Main Certificate"},"type":{"type":"string","description":"The type of the certificate, such as client, server, or other specified types.","example":"server","enum":["client","server"," mqtt"," wifi","filestore"]},"installTime":{"type":"string","description":"The date and time when the certificate was installed.","example":"2022-07-01T03:01:31.464Z","format":"date-time"},"issuerName":{"type":"string","description":"The name of the issuer of the certificate.","example":"FX9600EE5729"},"publicKeyAlg":{"type":"string","description":"The algorithm used for the public key.","enum":["RSA256","RSA512"]},"publicKey":{"type":"string","description":"The public key of the certificate in string format.","example":"091234acgbe12"},"serial":{"type":"string","description":"The serial number of the certificate.","example":"410835777"},"subjectName":{"type":"string","description":"The name of the subject to whom the certificate belongs.","example":"FX9600EE572"},"validFrom":{"type":"string","description":"The start date from which the certificate is valid.","example":"2022-07-01","format":"date"},"validTill":{"type":"string","description":"The end date until which the certificate is valid.","example":"2023-07-01","format":"date"}},"required":["type","installTime","issuerName","subjectName","validFrom","validTill"]}}}},"response":{"title":"response","x-stoplight":{"id":"1uzw0wye4si2y"},"type":"object","properties":{"code":{"type":"integer","example":0,"description":"Response codes:\n\n| Code | Meaning |\n| --- | --- |\n| 0 | Success |\n| 1 | Command payload is accepted |\n| 2 | Invalid payload |\n| 3 | Not able to retrieve information |\n| 4 | Firmware update in progress |\n| 5 | Can't reboot device, inventory in progress |\n| 6 | Region is not configured |\n| 7 | Interface is not available |\n| 8 | Insufficient flash size |\n| 9 | File not found |\n| 10 | Configuration already exists |\n| 11 | Inventory in progress |\n| 12 | No Radio Operation in Progress |\n| 13 | Firmware update Failed |\n| 14 | Battery is low, Cannot update firmware |\n| 15 | WIFI Error - SSID not found |\n| 16 | WIFI Error - Cannot delete active SSID |\n| 17 | WIFI Error - SSID missed |\n| 18 | WIFI Error - SSID already exist |\n| 19 | WIFI Error - SSID count overflow |\n| 20 | Wifi is not supported |\n| 21 | Certificate not found |\n| 22 | Advanced configuration not set |\n| 23 | Invalid enum value |\n| 24 | Max 32 prefilters limit exceeded |\n| 25 | Max 3 publish topics exceeded |\n| 26 | Max 1 subscribe topic exceeded |\n| 27 | Invalid tenant ID length |\n| 28 | Tag match pattern length exceeded |\n| 29 | Url missing for HTTP source |\n| 30 | Certificate content missing for direct source |","minimum":0,"maximum":30},"description":{"type":"string","description":"response description in detail","example":"Success"}},"required":["code","description"]}}},"examples":{"example1":{"value":{"command":"get_installed_certificates","requestId":"abc123","apiVersion":"V1.1","installedCerts":{"certInfo":[{"name":"ca_cert","type":"filestore","issuerName":"SotiConnectRoot","publicKeyAlg":"RSA","publicKey":"RSA","serial":"ed:83:dd:4a:47:dd:07:98","subjectName":"SotiConnectRoot","validFrom":"2024-07-01T07:00:00Z","validTill":"2034-02-28T15:18:47Z"},{"name":"ca_cert","type":"wifi","issuerName":"CA","publicKeyAlg":"RSA","publicKey":"RSA","serial":"1e:e0:12:f6:75:68:39:f1","subjectName":"CA","validFrom":"2024-07-01T07:00:00Z","validTill":"2025-04-16T07:26:35Z"},{"name":"ca_cert","type":"mqtt","issuerName":"SOTI-mqtt-ca","publicKeyAlg":"RSA","publicKey":"RSA","serial":"7d:1b:c5:9f:ea:ff:0f:56","subjectName":"SOTI-mqtt-ca","validFrom":"2024-07-01T07:00:00Z","validTill":"2038-01-19T03:14:07Z"},{"name":"client_cert","type":"mqtt","issuerName":"RootCA","publicKeyAlg":"RSA","publicKey":"RSA","serial":"1","subjectName":"Client","validFrom":"2024-07-01T07:00:00Z","validTill":"2030-05-06T08:06:57Z"},{"name":"client_cert","type":"wifi","issuerName":"CA","publicKeyAlg":"RSA","publicKey":"RSA","serial":"26:00:16:e0:c4:a1:b5:00","subjectName":"CLIENT","validFrom":"2024-07-01T07:00:00Z","validTill":"2025-04-16T07:27:52Z"}]},"response":{"code":0,"description":"Success"}}}}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
